page.primary_keyword: Marbella jet ski and boat rental combo
page.title: Marbella Jet Ski and Boat Combo: Thrills on the Water

data.meta_description: Book a Marbella jet ski and boat rental combo for adrenaline on the water. Our Mangusta 80 charter includes a jet ski free. Depart Puerto Banús.
data.summary: Combine jet ski thrills with luxury boat charter in Marbella. Our Mangusta 80 (24m) includes a jet ski free, departing Puerto Banús for a day of speed and sun.
key_facts: Mangusta 80 (24m) includes a jet ski free on 4-hour+ charters.
All combos depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and IVA.
Jet ski available on Mangusta 80 (white, grey, and standard variants).
Price from €4,719 for 4 hours (jet ski included).
Other boats: pricing on request via WhatsApp.
No hidden fees – full insurance and safety gear provided.

faq.q: Which boats include a jet ski in Marbella?
faq.a: Our Mangusta 80 (24m) variants – standard, white, and grey – all include a jet ski free on charters of 4 hours or more. Other boats can be arranged with a jet ski on request, but only the Mangusta 80 package guarantees it at no extra cost.

faq.q: How much does the jet ski and boat combo cost?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 combo starts at €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter. This includes the boat, skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and a jet ski – all with 21% IVA. Longer durations are available on request.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to ride the jet ski?
faq.a: No, you don't need a licence. Our skipper will give you a safety briefing and show you how to operate the jet ski. You simply enjoy the ride under supervision – it's safe and straightforward.

faq.q: Can I use the jet ski anywhere along the coast?
faq.a: You can ride the jet ski in designated areas near Puerto Banús, typically around the coastline towards Cabopino or Estepona. The skipper will guide you to safe, open-water spots away from swimmers and other boats.

faq.q: What is included in the charter besides the jet ski?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA. The jet ski is an added bonus on the Mangusta 80.

faq.q: How many people can join the jet ski and boat combo?
faq.a: The Mangusta 80 accommodates up to 12 guests. The jet ski is for one or two riders at a time, so everyone can take turns while others relax on the boat.

faq.q: What is the best time of day for the combo?
faq.a: Morning charters (10:00–14:00) offer calmer seas and cooler temperatures, ideal for jet skiing. Afternoon trips (14:00–18:00) give you sunset views. Both work well – it depends on your preference.

faq.q: How do I book the Marbella jet ski and boat combo?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We'll confirm your preferred date, boat variant (white, grey, or standard Mangusta 80), and duration. A deposit secures the booking.

data.body_html:
For those who want speed on the water without giving up luxury, a Marbella jet ski and boat rental combo is the perfect day out. Our Mangusta 80 (24m) charter includes a jet ski free, so you can blast across the Mediterranean then lounge on a spacious flybridge. Departing from Puerto Banús, this experience combines adrenaline with five-star comfort – all in one booking.

Why choose a jet ski and boat combo in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline is made for mixing thrills with relaxation. A jet ski lets you explore coves like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés at pace, while the boat provides shade, drinks, and a platform to jump off between rides. You get the best of both worlds without the hassle of renting separately.

Our Mangusta 80 – the only boat with a free jet ski

We offer three variants of the Mangusta 80 (standard, white, and grey), all 24 metres long and carrying up to 12 guests. Every charter of 4 hours or more includes a jet ski at no extra cost. The boat itself features a spacious flybridge, sun pads, and a saloon – ideal for groups.

  • Length: 24 m
  • Capacity: 12 pax
  • Departs: Puerto Banús
  • Jet ski: included free on 4h+ charters
  • Price: from €4,719 for 4 hours (all inclusive)

What to expect on the water

Your charter starts at Puerto Banús, Marbella's glamorous marina. After a safety briefing, the skipper takes you out past the Golden Mile. You can ride the jet ski in designated areas – typically near Cabopino or Estepona – while the boat follows at a safe distance. The rest of the time, you can swim, sunbathe, or enjoy drinks and snacks on board.

Pricing and inclusions

The Mangusta 80 combo is priced at €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter. This covers the boat, skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden extras. For longer durations, contact us via WhatsApp.

See our full Boat Rental Marbella fleet for other options.

How to book your jet ski and boat combo

Booking is straightforward. Message us on WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired duration. We'll confirm availability and send payment details. A deposit secures the slot, and the balance is due on the day.

Explore more Marbella boat experiences for inspiration.

Frequently asked questions

Which boats include a jet ski in Marbella?

Our Mangusta 80 (24m) variants – standard, white, and grey – all include a jet ski free on charters of 4 hours or more. Other boats can be arranged with a jet ski on request, but only the Mangusta 80 package guarantees it at no extra cost.

How much does the jet ski and boat combo cost?

The Mangusta 80 combo starts at €4,719 for a minimum 4-hour charter. This includes the boat, skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and a jet ski – all with 21% IVA. Longer durations are available on request.

Do I need a licence to ride the jet ski?

No, you don't need a licence. Our skipper will give you a safety briefing and show you how to operate the jet ski. You simply enjoy the ride under supervision – it's safe and straightforward.

Can I use the jet ski anywhere along the coast?

You can ride the jet ski in designated areas near Puerto Banús, typically around the coastline towards Cabopino or Estepona. The skipper will guide you to safe, open-water spots away from swimmers and other boats.

What is included in the charter besides the jet ski?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA. The jet ski is an added bonus on the Mangusta 80.

How many people can join the jet ski and boat combo?

The Mangusta 80 accommodates up to 12 guests. The jet ski is for one or two riders at a time, so everyone can take turns while others relax on the boat.

What is the best time of day for the combo?

Morning charters (10:00–14:00) offer calmer seas and cooler temperatures, ideal for jet skiing. Afternoon trips (14:00–18:00) give you sunset views. Both work well – it depends on your preference.

How do I book the Marbella jet ski and boat combo?

Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We'll confirm your preferred date, boat variant (white, grey, or standard Mangusta 80), and duration. A deposit secures the booking.

Ready for the ride? Book your Marbella jet ski and boat rental combo today and experience the coast like never before.
